pi_items.source: Task description (line 17 of task.json) and verifier.py (line 37, default value). Web search confirms this is synthetic/fictional data - no such school exists in Springfield, IL 62704.

Task description (line 18 of task.json) and verifier.py (line 38, default value). Web search found no specific information about this address in Springfield, IL 62704 - appears to be synthetic test data.
Task description (line 19 of task.json) and verifier.py (line 39, default value). Springfield is a real city in Illinois (state capital).
Task description (line 20 of task.json) and verifier.py (line 40, default value). IL is the correct abbreviation for Illinois.
Task description (line 21 of task.json) and verifier.py (line 41, default value). Web search confirmed 62704 is a valid zip code for Springfield, Illinois.

Task description (line 22 of task.json) and verifier.py (line 42, default value). This is a fictional phone number: 217 is the real area code for Springfield, IL, but 555 exchange is reserved by NANP for fictional use. Common in test data.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to add a new school record named Riverside Academy with address 450 River Road, Springfield, IL 62704, and phone 217-555-0198 to the OpenSIS database. All metadata values match the task description exactly and are referenced correctly by the verifier code. The data is entirely synthetic: 'Riverside Academy' is a fictional school name (web search confirms no such school exists in Springfield, IL 62704), '450 River Road' is a fictional address with no matching real location, and '217-555-0198' is a test phone number using the real Springfield, IL area code (217) but the NANP-reserved 555 exchange for fictional numbers. The city (Springfield) and zip code (62704) correspond to real locations in Illinois.
